propertyNames.description: Validation rule identifier (camelCase, starts with lowercase letter)

expr.description: Boolean expression that must evaluate to true for the form to be valid. Has access to field values directly (e.g., "ssn or ein") and defs section values.

message.description: Error message displayed when the rule fails (expression evaluates to false)

severity.description: Severity level: error (default) blocks submission, warning allows but warns

description: Form-level validation rules keyed by rule identifier. Rules use expr-eval-fork expressions to validate cross-field constraints.
title: RulesSection
